landing.hero_description: A new kind of therapeutic experience. Always available, deeply personal, and built with care.
landing.section1_body: Lyra is available 24/7 — no waiting rooms, no scheduling. Whenever you need support, your therapist is ready.
landing.section2_body: Built on CBT, DBT, ACT, Somatic and Psychodynamic frameworks — Lyra adapts its approach to what works best for you.
landing.section3_body: Your sessions are encrypted end-to-end. What you share stays between you and Lyra.

therapist.choose_subtitle: Select the therapist you'd like to work with today.
therapist.lyra_description: Warm, patient, and deeply intuitive. Lyra specializes in anxiety, burnout, and emotional regulation.
